title: Tiers
description: This project adds tiers to minecraft. Start at wood tier and use only wooden tools to fight and kill players to level up and eventually become netherite.
body:
# Summary
This mod/datapack adds a tier system to minecraft. Players start at wood tier and upgrade as they get kills or craft tier-up items. Each tier of player gives access to tools and armor of that tier and below. Players with low tiers are worth less to high tier players as killing them will not immediately grant the next tier. Players cannot pick up, craft, and dispense onto themselves items that are above their tier.
